Author: 246tnt
Content:
Because of the COB process that means you have to use our big standard breakout so I'm not sure it'll be suitable for anything "high speed" in any case.  Processes where you can get the QFN ( sky or ihp ) are more suitable.

I'm hoping TT would also offer "bare chip" bonded to a small COB PCB like the W.S one of run.1. but not sure that will happen, that's not my decision.
